scripts.validate: node ../scripts/validate-events.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-news.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-trash.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-holidays.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-fleamarkets.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-kmc.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-kmc-trips.mjs && node ../scripts/validate-family.mjs
